\documentclass[11pt]{article}
\usepackage[margin=0.9in]{geometry}
\usepackage{fancyhdr,xcolor,pifont,enumitem}
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
% Per-student exam ID macros
% NB: use \@ifundefined+\def (not \providecommand) so the default empty value
% produces a non-\long macro, which \ifx-compares equal to \@empty.
\makeatletter
\@ifundefined{studentname}{\def\studentname{}}{}
\@ifundefined{studentid}{\def\studentid{}}{}
\@ifundefined{studentserial}{\def\studentserial{}}{}
\makeatother
\providecommand{\examserial}{XXXXXXXX}
\fancyfoot[L]{\textit{\footnotesize Generated}}
\fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
\makeatletter
\fancyfoot[R]{\textit{\footnotesize Serial \texttt{\examserial}%
  \ifx\studentserial\@empty\else
    \ \textperiodcentered\ ID \texttt{\studentserial}%
  \fi}}
% \fieldline{width}{value} — value rests ON the rule (empty value => blank line).
\newcommand{\fieldline}[2]{%
  \rlap{\hspace{0.5em}\raisebox{2.2pt}{#2}}\rule[-3pt]{#1}{0.8pt}%
}
\newcommand{\identityinstruction}{%
  \ifx\studentname\@empty
    {\sffamily\bfseries\small\ding{43}~~PRINT CLEARLY. UNNAMED EXAMS CANNOT BE RETURNED OR GRADED.}%
  \else
    {\sffamily\bfseries\small\ding{43}~~VERIFY YOUR NAME AND STUDENT ID BELOW ARE CORRECT, THEN ADD TODAY'S DATE.}%
  \fi%
}
\makeatother
% Answer-key toggle: \def\answersmode{1} before \input to enable
\makeatletter
\@ifundefined{answersmode}{%
  \newif\ifanswers\answersfalse
}{%
  \newif\ifanswers\answerstrue
}
\makeatother
% Key color
\definecolor{keyred}{rgb}{0.75,0.0,0.0}
% Section heading command
\newcommand{\examsection}[1]{\subsection*{#1}}
% Choice commands (inline display)
\newcommand{\correctchoice}[1]{#1}
\newcommand{\wrongchoice}[1]{#1}
\begin{document}
\section*{Form B Exam Fixture}
\noindent\identityinstruction\par\vspace{12pt}
\noindent{\sffamily\bfseries\large NAME:}~\fieldline{13.5cm}{\large\studentname}\par\vspace{14pt}
\noindent{\sffamily\bfseries\large STUDENT ID\#:}~\fieldline{5.5cm}{\large\ttfamily\studentid}\hfill{\sffamily\bfseries\large DATE:}~\rule[-3pt]{4cm}{0.8pt}\par\vspace{6pt}
\examsection{Multiple Choice}
\begin{enumerate}
\item \textit{(2 pts)}~Form B question: pick (b).
  \begin{enumerate}[label=(\alph*)]
    \item \wrongchoice{alpha}
    \item \correctchoice{beta}
  \end{enumerate}
  \ifanswers \textcolor{keyred}{\textbf{Answer:} b} \fi
\item \textit{(1 pt)}~\textsc{T~/~F.}~Form B true-false item.
  \ifanswers \textcolor{keyred}{\textbf{Answer:} False} \fi
\end{enumerate}
\end{document}
